name: liquidation_cascade_v1_grid
description: Liquidation Cascade Entry v1 — initial parameter search. Counter-trend entry after rapid liquidation cascade exhaustion on Bybit perpetuals. Symbols: BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB/AVAX. Edge: price overshoots during cascade, snaps back when forced selling stops. RSI panic + volume spike + EMA dislocation filters.
_combo_count: 3×3×2×3×3×3×3×3×2 = 8748 / divided by fixed vars = ~3888 effective combos
_note: Longs only first (shorts too risky in cascade). After seeing results, run v1_shorts with LC_ALLOW_SHORTS=1, LC_ALLOW_LONGS=0 separately.
_key_challenge: Backtests don't have OI data — using pure price + RSI + volume cascade detection. Real edge enhanced by live OI monitoring (add OI filter in v2 after live testing).
_goal: Find drop_pct + RSI + vol_spike threshold with PF≥1.7, trades≥20. This strategy will have FEW but HIGH-QUALITY signals. If backtest shows PF≥2.0 with 20+ trades — ready for live paper mode.
